programs.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "When Genes Mix With The Wrong Environment"
programs.sub_title: When Genes Mix With The Wrong Environment
programs.desc: The Dunedin Study has identified a fundamental developmental mechanism that completely rewrites the nature versus nurture argument

programs.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "Dirt Is Good, Dirt Poor Is Bad"
programs.sub_title: Dirt Is Good, Dirt Poor Is Bad
programs.desc: This episode of the series examines ways in which the results of the Dunedin study have contributed to a new understanding of early influences in a person's life

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Space As A Tax Haven"
programs.desc: For the ultra-wealthy, the best part of making money is avoiding taxes. Space could be an astronomical payday, but will all that profit slip by tax free?

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Traveling So Fast Time Slows Down"
programs.sub_title: Traveling So Fast Time Slows Down
programs.desc: When we start thinking about traveling at speeds close to the speed of light, our perception of time’s passing starts to get pretty mind-bending.

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "Space & Shelter"
programs.desc: Resources are tight in space. Everything that goes up there has mass and therefore a cost.

programs.title: Space Greed S1 - "World Wide Wifi"
programs.desc: How will “world wide wifi” change the world again?
